headline: Iskandar Malaysia Falls 40% Short of Investment Target
context: IRDA reported cumulative investment of RM382 billion against original RM638 billion target for 2006-2025 period.

cards.big: Iskandar achieved only 60% of RM638 billion investment target
cards.sub: Twenty-year development corridor missed goals across sectors

cards.big: Foreign investment comprised only 28% of total versus targeted 45%
cards.sub: Chinese developer pullback since 2019 removed RM45 billion in commitments

cards.big: Population reached 2.1 million against projected 3 million creating oversupply
cards.sub: 30,000 completed residential units remain empty in southern corridor

cards.big: Transport delivery achieved 52% of planned connectivity improvements
cards.sub: RTS Link delay means cross-border traffic still relies on congested Causeway

cards.big: Iskandar shortfall tests whether long-term development plans survive political cycles
Iskandar Malaysia 40% below investment target. Special economic zones succeed on execution, not branding.
